zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Keith of Syntoun於1342年出生在蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾希頓時，她的父親Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland63歲，母親Christian Menteith22歲。她於1362年之前與David de Barclay Baron of Brechin結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1413年在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金享年71歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾達利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Keith of Syntoun于1342年出生在苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾希頓时，她的父亲Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland63岁，母亲Christian Menteith22岁。她于1362年之前与David de Barclay Baron of Brechin结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1413年在英国苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金享年71岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾達利。

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Keith of Syntoun was born in 1342, in Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland, her father, Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland, was 63 and her mother, Christian Menteith, was 22. She married David de Barclay Baron of Brechin before 1362. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1413, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Keith of Syntoun est née en 1342, à Synton, Selkirkshire, Écosse, son père, Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Christian Menteith, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé David de Barclay Baron of Brechin avant 1362. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1413, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Darnley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Keith of Syntoun 1342 in Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland 63 und ihre Mutter Christian Menteith 22. Sie hat vor 1362 David de Barclay Baron of Brechin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1413 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Keith of Syntoun è nata il nel 1342 nel Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland, sua padre, Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland, aveva 63 anni e sua madre, Christian Menteith, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato David de Barclay Baron of Brechin prima del 1362. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1413, nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Keith of Syntounが1342年にスコットランドセルキルクシュアイアシントンで生まれた時，父Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotlandは63歳，母Christian Menteithは22歳であった。1362年以前にDavid de Barclay Baron of Brechinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1413年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで71歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアダルンリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Keith of Syntoun(이)가 1342년 스컷랜드 셀커크실르 시턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland(은)는 63세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Menteith(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1362년 이전 David de Barclay Baron of Brechin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1413년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 더른리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Keith of Syntoun nasceu em 1342, em Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Christian Menteith, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com David de Barclay Baron of Brechin antes 1362. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1413, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Keith of Syntoun родилась в 1342 г. в местности синтон, селкиркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Christian Menteith, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David de Barclay Baron of Brechin перед 1362 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1413 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности дарнли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Keith of Syntoun nació en 1342, en Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland, su papá, Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland, tenía 63 años y su mamá, Christian Menteith, tenía 22 años. Se casó con David de Barclay Baron of Brechin antes de 1362. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1413, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
